description: Communication — Threaded discussions and network feed

tasks.title: Content Service — Discussions and Feed in Docker
tasks.prompt:
Implement the Content Service (M3.1 + M3.2) as specified in SNAPP-TRD.md WU-3.1 and WU-3.2.

Create Snapp.Service.Content with both discussion and feed endpoints:

Discussion endpoints:
  POST /api/content/networks/{netId}/threads — create thread (verify membership + CreatePost permission, create DISC# + initial REPLY#)
  GET /api/content/networks/{netId}/threads — list threads (newest first, paginated)
  GET /api/content/threads/{threadId} — get thread detail
  POST /api/content/threads/{threadId}/replies — add reply (update ReplyCount + LastReplyAt, detect @mentions → queue notification)
  GET /api/content/threads/{threadId}/replies — list replies (chronological, paginated)
  DELETE /api/content/threads/{threadId}/replies/{replyId} — soft-delete (author or moderator only)

Feed endpoints:
  POST /api/content/networks/{netId}/posts — create post (FEED# + UPOST# items)
  GET /api/content/networks/{netId}/feed — network feed (newest first, paginated)
  GET /api/content/users/{userId}/posts — user's post history
  POST /api/content/posts/{postId}/react — add/update reaction (REACT# item, atomic increment on post)
  DELETE /api/content/posts/{postId}/react — remove reaction (decrement)

Repository: ContentRepository implementing IContentRepository against snapp-content table.
Dockerfile + docker-compose (snapp-content, port 8084). Kong route: /api/content/* (JWT required).

Integration tests: create thread, reply, list; create post, react, list feed; verify non-member access blocked; verify @mention notification written to snapp-notif table.
tasks.done_when: Content service runs in Docker. Threads, replies, posts, reactions all work through Kong. Integration tests pass.

tasks.title: Discussion UI
tasks.prompt:
Implement discussion pages using MudBlazor as specified in SNAPP-TRD.md WU-3.3.

1. Pages/Discussion/List.razor (/networks/{netId}/discuss):
   - MudList of threads: MudListItem with title, author name, MudBadge reply count, 'last reply X ago'
   - MudButton 'New Thread' → opens MudDialog
   - Sorted by LastReplyAt (most recently active first)
   - MudButton 'Load More' with NextToken pagination

2. Pages/Discussion/View.razor (/networks/{netId}/discuss/{threadId}):
   - Thread title (MudText Typo.H5) + original post at top
   - MudDivider
   - Replies: MudList, each reply has mini ProfileCard (MudAvatar + name), content (markdown rendered via Markdig → MarkupString), timestamp
   - Own replies: MudIconButton delete
   - Reply composer at bottom: MudTextField multiline + MudButton 'Reply'

3. Components/Discussion/CreateThreadDialog.razor:
   - MudDialog with MudTextField Title + MudTextField Content (multiline)
   - Submit → POST creates thread, closes dialog, navigates to thread view

4. Components/Discussion/ReplyComposer.razor:
   - MudTextField multiline with MudButton Submit
   - Shift+Enter for newline hint text

5. bUnit tests for all components.
tasks.done_when: Thread list, thread view, reply composer all functional. Markdown renders. bUnit tests pass.

tasks.title: Feed UI
tasks.prompt:
Implement feed pages using MudBlazor as specified in SNAPP-TRD.md WU-3.4.

1. Pages/Feed/NetworkFeed.razor (/networks/{netId}/feed):
   - Post composer at top: MudCard with MudTextField (auto-grow), MudSelect PostType (Text/Milestone), character count, MudButton 'Post'
   - Feed items below using PostCard component
   - Infinite scroll or MudButton 'Load More'

2. Components/Feed/PostCard.razor:
   - MudCard with:
     - MudCardHeader: MudAvatar + author name (link to profile) + relative timestamp
     - MudCardContent: markdown rendered via Markdig → MarkupString
     - MudCardActions: MudIconButton for each reaction (like/insightful/support) with MudBadge count, highlight user's current reaction

3. Components/Feed/PostComposer.razor:
   - MudTextField multiline with character count (max 5000)
   - MudSelect for post type
   - MudButton Submit
   - 'Posting to: {NetworkName}' MudText subtitle

4. Add Markdig NuGet package to Snapp.Client for markdown rendering.

5. bUnit tests.
tasks.done_when: Feed displays posts. Composer creates posts. Reactions toggle. Markdown renders. bUnit tests pass.

tasks.title: Sprint 4 integration validation
tasks.prompt: Validate Sprint 4. Run all tests. Walkthrough: login, select network, create thread, reply, create post, react. Verify non-members blocked. Write .claude/reports/sprint-4-validation.md.
tasks.done_when: All tests pass. Discussion and feed functional. Validation report written.
